title: Creating a Team in Microsoft Teams
what_it_is: Team creation is setting up a new Team in Microsoft Teams — the shared space a group uses for channels, files, posts and conversations.
why_use_it: Getting the setup right at the start means the group has one consistent, findable space from day one, rather than posts and files scattered across email and chat.
how_to: Open Teams and select Teams from the left-hand menu.
Select Join or create a team, then Create team.
Choose the team type that matches your group, for example Class.
Name the team clearly, following your area's naming convention.
Add members, and check owner and member roles are set correctly before sharing the link.
